steps.title: Set up the equation using the desired profit
steps.content:
The profit function is $p(x) = 5x - 240$. To find how many stickers need to be sold for a profit of $700$, set $p(x) = 700$:
$$700 = 5x - 240$$

steps.title: Solve the linear equation for x
steps.content:
Add 240 to both sides of the equation:
$$5x = 940$$
Divide both sides by 5:
$$x = \frac{940}{5} = 188$$
The student council must sell 188 car stickers.
